summary.art: April 3, 2026: ART OnO fair opens today at SETEC (running through April 5), emphasizing project-based engagement. Market sentiment remains buoyed by the historic auction results yesterday, including the record-breaking KRW 15 billion sale of Yoshitomo Nara's 'Nothing about it'.
summary.market: April 3, 2026: Markets are digesting the 8.4% rally seen on April 1. Investor sentiment is cautiously optimistic as oil prices ease amid hopes for de-escalation in the Middle East. The KRX remains focused on domestic stability after recent volatility.
